name: Crunchy Italian Popcorn Mix
recipeIngredient: 10 cups Popped popcorn (from a microwave bag)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the popped popcorn and bugle-shaped corn snacks in a large microwavable bowl.
2. In a 1-cup micro-safe measure, combine the remaining ingredients except the Parmesan cheese.
3. Microwave on HIGH for about 1 minute or until the margarine melts; stir.
4. Pour the melted mixture over the popcorn mix and toss until evenly coated.
5. Return to the microwave and cook uncovered for 2-4 minutes, stirring every minute, until toasted.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Serve warm. Makes 10 cups.
